problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
